arts.ttl: Player Ratings: Girona 0 - 3 Real Madrid; 2024 La Liga
arts.sum: Finished the game with 1 assist, 2 big chances created, 4 key passes, 8/10 long balls, and over 120 touches. Tchouameni—7: Best performances for Real Madrid have come as a center back and tonight was no different.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid's fixture schedule for 2025 Club World Cup
arts.sum: Matchday 2: Real Madrid -Pachuca, Bank of America Stadium, Charlotte (Sunday, 22 June, 9 pm CET). Matchday 1: Real Madrid -Al Hilal, Hard Rock Stadium, Miami (Wednesday, 18 June, 9 pm CET).

arts.ttl: Three observations from Real Madrid’s 3-0 win vs Girona
arts.sum: Real Madrid ’s first half against Girona was not unusual this season, but it did not matter as they cruised to a 3-0 win, with a goal each from Kylian Mbappe, Jude Bellingham and Arda Guler. Bellingham has been one of the best players in this stretch of the season where, although Real Madrid have collected wins, they have also lost a few, and those few were more important than the ones they won.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Girona 0 - 3 Real Madrid, Post-game, La Liga 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani and Mehedi Hassan discuss: It also serves as a means for Real Madrid fans to connect and discuss the team.

arts.ttl: William Saliba hands Arsenal major boost as Gunners star speaks out on his future - amid links to Spanish giants Real Madrid
arts.sum: Saliba's impressive performances for Arsenal have reportedly drawn the attention of Real Madrid, with the Spanish giants said to have made the defender one of their key transfer targets.

arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has provided an explanation for his decision to leave Raúl Asencio out of his starting line-up to face Girona. Real are of course fresh…

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti: “Bellingham is fine and is available for Atalanta”
arts.sum: “It took him a while to get into the game, he worked hard, he wasn’t accurate in the first half, but in the second he scored a fantastic goal. The goal takes a bit of pressure off him, he’s a youngster with a lot of pressure around him and it’s good for him to take some of it off.”

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti offers triple Real Madrid injury update ahead of Atalanta clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid have a quick turnaround ahead of their UEFA Champions League trip to Atalanta on December 10. Los Blancos secured a vital 3-0 La Liga weekend win at Girona but they have less than 72 hours to prepare for a showdown in Bergamo.
